description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden stock, handguard, and pistol grip, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel. The rifle features a curved detachable magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and a prominent front sight post. The wooden components have a reddish-brown hue, contrasting with the dark metallic elements. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a simple muzzle, lacking any advanced muzzle device. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments where durability and reliability are essential.
description: A robust assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine, resembling an AK-47 style weapon.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the front sight post.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, and curved magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the end of the wooden stock and the slim profile of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the wooden and metal construction, curved magazine, and overall silhouette.
